hero.hero_overview: Bruno, the current captain of the Eruditio Rangers and a star footballer, had a very eventful past. Born in the Agelta Drylands, Bruno grew up in a remote village surrounded by poverty. But it was those hardships that fueled his longing for freedom. As soon as he was of age, Bruno joined a caravan in hopes of seeing the world. Unfortunately, a tragic accident robbed him of his legs and his freedom. But fate was on his side, for when the caravan passed him through Eruditio, Bruno was offered a second chance. Although it came with great risk, he was so touched by the passion of the city that he decided to take that chance, and in the end of his courage paid off. He not only regained his legs, but was now faster than ever. Instead of continuing his travels, he decided to remain in Eruditio and become its protector. He vowed to uphold the ideals of the Oasis in the desert and help others find true freedom.
hero.hero_strength: Bruno's strength relies on properly playing with his balls. His entire point is constantly hitting enemies with his enhanced basic attacks which hurts a lot and is way more consistent than Lesley. Bruno done right is a massive lane bully.
hero.hero_weakness: Crowd control and assasin

spell.spell_desc: More durability

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Any Tank is good for Bruno. His synergy is almost perfect.
You can easily chase you enemies with Mathilda. Poking and escaping too.
Classic like the old days. Still works tho.

counters.counter_desc: Be careful when Franco is present. You don't want to be in his menu.
Extremely annoying 😂

dominants.dominant_desc:
Safe farm on your lane, wait to your team for ganking.
Priorities for getting key items.
Level up your 1st skill, maintain the stacks for extra damage (2% extra crit chance up to 10 stacks)

Assuming you got your 2 key items, now the party begins. Just kick everyone in front of you. Even Tanks can't handle the damage (yet). 

Remember to be mindful and careful. Always positioned yourself behind your Tank

Bruno is basic attack DPS, so the main source of your damage is from your axe thumb 👍 

The combo is easy,
If you have 10 stacks already, you can immediately join the war.
Your ult can also give you stacks as it bounces. 
Pick up the ball where it landed on. Your 2nd can also pull the ball. If you can't, ask your teammates to kick it to you (touch it 😂).

emblems.emblem_desc:
Standard Bruno's late game carry emblem.
Extra crit to boost your damage. Tenacity for a bit protection. QC is useful in every situation (chasing, fleeing)
Reliable for pushing turrets if you aim for fast end.

equips.equip_desc:
Chose your boots situational, but Rapid Boots is always good choice.

Haas' Claws and Berserker's Fury are your key items. Once you get it, you're ready for joining war.

Malefic Gun is situational, you can chose it if your enemies are mainly Charge (Khaleed, Roger, Freya, Etc).
Chose Malefic Roar if your enemies are Tanker.
Basically the same as standard build, but with more attack speed.

hero.hero_overview: The top football player of Erudito!
hero.hero_strength: Current top DPS for marksman hero, along with Layla (can't even believe it)
hero.hero_weakness:
Fragile, a bit slow movement speed, lacking escape skill.
Requires you to have good map awareness and positioning, in order to avoid getting pwned by enemies.

spell.spell_desc:
Flicker is solid choice, as Bruno doesn't have any escape skills besides his 2nd, and adding more chasing strategies.

But you can also choose Aegis, Sprint, or Inspire situatonal only.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Chou: Can kick enemies away with his The Way of Dragon, isolating targets for Bruno to take down quickly.

counters.counter_desc: Bruno can easily out-damage Layla in the early game due to his higher burst potential, especially if he lands critical hits with his Volley Shot.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, Bruno should focus on safe farming, poking with Volley Shot, and avoiding overextending. Play defensively to avoid ganks and wait for your core items to unlock your full potential for mid-game team fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: These talents work well for Bruno, especially in early to mid-game, amplifying his burst and crit-focused playstyle. However, they are situational and may lack the scaling and utility of the Marksman Emblem. Use them if you want to focus on high early-game damage potential.

equips.equip_desc: This item build for Bruno is effective because it maximizes his critical damage, survivability, and sustain while addressing his weaknesses

hero.hero_overview:
Role: Marksman
Specialty: Reap/Burst Damage
hero.hero_strength:
Strengths of Bruno in the Laning Phase
1.High Early Damage
2.Good Poke
3.Mobility & CC
4.Fast Scaling
5.Team Synergy
hero.hero_weakness:
Bruno has several weaknesses during the laning phase, especially as a marksman:
1.Squishy and Low Durability
2.Limited Mobility Early On
3.Relies on Skill Cooldowns
4.Dependent on Farm
5.Vulnerable to Harassment
6.Weak Against Early Pressure

spell.spell_desc: Purify on Bruno to counter crowd control (CC) and improve survivability. It removes stuns, slows, or immobilizations, allowing you to escape or reposition with Flying Tackle. It's especially effective against CC-heavy enemies like Franco or Tigreal, ensuring Bruno can stay active in fights and deal consistent damage.

data.title: bruno god in high rank

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Bruno and Diggie has a good synergy. Diggies purifying skill and damage force the enemy to back off giving bruno all the gold and exp.
Khufra's ambush shot call sets the enemy making it easy for the teammates to score a kill.

counters.counter_desc: Wanwan's basic attack is slow in the early game and Bruno has more range than Wanwan making it easy for bruno to spam her enhanced basic attacks and Wanwan has low HP/Squishy making it an easy target for Bruno. Just make sure to keep distance while attacking and dodge skills to outplay Wanwan.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on maximizing your passive. Hit your enemy with full stacks of passive make them go back to base so you can take the gold plate on the tower. Just spam this and your good and be careful on emey ganks have map awareness. Maximize the use of dual ball from your 1st skill.
In the mid game look at the time remember the lord upgrade time look for towers you can take down focus on your items first if the enemy presents itself then hit it the dual ball in your first skill.

Dont be too aggressive let your tank take the lead and wait for the call look out for assassins in your back always be ready to buy and sell your items for added survivability. Dont forget the Lord in order to have higher chance of taking/destroying the base of the enemy. The higher the lord level the stronger its power.

emblems.emblem_desc: Assassin Emblem for penetration in early game to late game, added adaptive attack and movement speed increase. As for Fatal it increases the crit rate and crit damage which is very useful in early game. Weapon Master increases the physical attack(adaptive) that comes from your Item, Talent, Emblem, Skills. Quantum Charge for HP Regen and increases Movement speed it works when you hit an enemy with basic attack.

equips.equip_desc:
Crit Rate increases and Life steal with each attack plus attack range boost with physical damage defense item.

You can change the boots in late game into Immortality, Rose Gold Meteor for better survivability.

This build is my favorite it can One Hit any squishy enemies when the sky piercer has full stack. The build may change depending on your state if your team is behind on gold and exp just change the sky piercer into Wind of Nature or Rose Gold Meteor then the Boots can be swapped with immortality in late game.

hero.hero_overview: Bruno is a Marksman which can snowball the game from early to late game if you maximize the uses of passive skill and first skill which is the enhanced basic attack.
hero.hero_strength: Bruno's strength lies within the ball he's using to attack the enemy and each attack adds a stack of the passive skill which increase the crit rate of his attack. Just focus on your gold lane, map, item first just harass the enemies if they get close to you. The tower is you're protectorrun back to it if there's multiple enemies ganking
hero.hero_weakness: His weakness is very simple. You lose the ball, you lose your power to fight back enemies in numbers. So keep in my that getting the ball and increasing the number of ball is a must. Rushing without item and teammate to support your back is asking for death so keep your awareness on and focus on your objectives.

spell.spell_desc: Use Flicker to retreat, dodge, chase enemies. Flicker your way out or in it's your choice use it wisely.

emblems.emblem_desc: Because these three emblems are the best for Bruno at the moment, where the three emblem sets have a 10% increase critical effect, where critical is very important for Bruno, And why I chose tenacity over the others is because tenacity has an effect When hp is below 50% Can add magic or physical defense increased by 15%,And why I chose Quantum charge because dealing damage with basic attack increase movement speed by 30% for 1,5 second and restore your hp 75-180 hp scalling with you level.

equips.equip_desc: Berseker Fury For Increase crtical damade bruno, Haas Claw for lifesteal Bruno, Malefic Gun for increase range basic attack Bruno, Wind Of Nature for immune physical damage, And last Blade Of Despair for extra physical damage

hero.hero_overview: Bruno is hero marksman he has very high damage in the early to late game, and he also has an escape skill that makes it difficult for opponents to gank him.
hero.hero_strength: Bruno has a passive skill called Mecha Legs and the passive skill has an effect increases his critical chance, and also Bruno can play aggresif and safe By using his skill 2 which is called Flying Tackle.
hero.hero_weakness: Bruno relies heavily on the Berseker Fury item to increase his critical and also Haas's Claws Which has a 20% lifesteal Where these two items are very important for Bruno in the early game.

spell.spell_desc: Why do I prefer the purify spell over flicker? Because purify is very important for Bruno if he is affected by crowd control effects, which are very troublesome for marksman.

data.title: Bruno Most Powerfull Hero In The Gold Lane

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Bruno and Diggie has a term word "Lason" which means a poison in ranked games. Because teaming uo with Diggie will give you an advantage in laning pahse and you will not worry about crowd controls in teamifights because of the Time's Journey of Diggie's ultimate.

counters.counter_desc: This prioritize the sustainability of laning because Floryn has high healing hp and it blends well in teamfight because Bruno is hard to kill.

This combo is a two lane strategy which you can swap lane easily because of the second skill of Mathilda which helps Bruno to rotate faster than other marksmen. This will lead a high advantage in farming and pushing.

dominants.dominant_desc: The trick is the attack speed of Bruno because the rhythm of ball relies on the attack speed of Bruno which you can activate 3 skill one on his basic attacks. Dont be afraid in 1v1 because Bruno with his items is at advantage to win that situation. Last tip is to poke your enemies back so you can take all gold plates as well as the gold crab to gain advantage in gold.
dominants.dominant_title: In early game you must playsafe to gain the core items of Bruno. Once you get its core items, you are ready to win skirmishes and teamfights with good positioning and micro mechanics.

emblems.emblem_desc: I choose this emblem set to balance the stats of Bruno because Marksman Emblem gives high damage, high attack speed, and lifesteal in early game. For the talents I choose Fatal for extra crit chance and crit damage, Bargain Hunter for fast items, and Quantum Charge for sustaining lane and chase enemies. This will help Bruno dominate the gold lane.

equips.equip_desc: This full build will prioritize the ball rhythm, high burst damage, and high sustain in teamfights.

hero.hero_overview: Bruno is a marksman with high control of lane and high poke damage.  When using Bruno you should be aware on your surroundings as well in the map to keep yourself safe from ganks and you can farm freely and dominate the game.
hero.hero_strength: Bruno's biggest advantage is his passive which it can be triggered by his first skill hitting the enemy then Bruno will gain 2% each stacks up to 20% of crit chance which is an advantage in early game to late game. His second skill is his only mobility whether you will use it in or out in teamfight clashes. In clash you must focus to target who is in front, in order for them to retreat because Bruno has high poke damage. Just be aware of your positioning to get that advantage in clashes.
hero.hero_weakness: Bruno has only one mobility other than flicker or purify and dont let Bruno farm in early game to make it hard for him to deal damage in clashes. So the best way to kill him is to draft a heroes that is a pick off specialist or burst heroes like Lunox, Aurora, Cecilion(For range mage), Chou, Edith, Kaja, Franco,  or other heroes with hard Crowd Controls. Make sure that you have enough burst when picking off Bruno because if you fail to pick off Bruno, surely it will be a downfall for your team.

data.recommend: I recommend this build and strategy to unleash the potential of Bruno by using him efficiently in ranked ges or pro scenes.

spell.spell_desc: I choose Inspire spell to dominate early to late game prowess. This will help Bruno to outplay enemies if they fail to pick off. So basically this is a great advantage in early game to back off enemies and push the turret to farm freely.

data.title: Bruno Ball Strategy

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Mathilda. Bruno can postion himself safe with the skill 2 of Mathilda, guiding wind and a battle spell of purify the enemy heroes can't reach this combo easily.

counters.counter_desc: Cecilion can counter Bruno spefically in the late game, with the first skill of Cecilion + stacks he can poke Bruno and makee Bruno position awkwardly.

dominants.dominant_desc: Bruno struggle in the early part of the game when you don't have a stack on your first skill, maintain a full stack of 10 on your first skill to maximize your damage and can exchange blow to your enemy marksman.

emblems.emblem_desc: With this emblems you can exchange a hit with the enemy marksman because you have a master assassin that deals a 7% increased when there's only one enemy hero.

equips.equip_desc: This builds helps you to deal a great damage while maintaing a good position with malefic gun because of its added attack range.

hero.hero_overview: In the current meta, bruno dominates the lanes (gold lane) with the current adjust of the item Malefic Gun. Bruno deals a lot of damage/crit damage with his first skill + the new trinity marksman build (Haas claw, berserkers and malefic gun), you can spam it in your ranked games and watch some idea in the currently happening m6.
hero.hero_strength: With his remarkable passive skill, Mecha Legs, that can provide up to a whopping twenty percent critical chance, Bruno has solidified his place as a popular marksman hero in the current meta with the adjusted malefic gun, Bruno can deal great damage in clash with a great range that other heroes such as fighters and tanks can't reach this hero
hero.hero_weakness: Bruno's weaknesses is the high poking mage such as cecilion and xavier, through their poking abilities cecilion and xavier can make bruno in the awkward position and can't hit or freehit properly during clash.

data.recommend: SPAM BRUNO TO CLIMB YOUR RANK!

spell.spell_desc: With this spell, Bruno can position himself safe without thinking that he will catch a hard crowd-control skills because this spell grants you removing all debuffs.

hero.hero_overview: Bruno, the current captain of the Eruditio Rangers and a star footballer, had a very eventful past. Born in the Agelta Drylands, Bruno grew up in a remote village surrounded by poverty. But it was those hardships that fueled his longing for freedom. As soon as he was of age, Bruno joined a caravan in hopes of seeing the world. Unfortunately, a tragic accident robbed him of his legs and his freedom. emblems.emblem_desc: Set emblems to marksman emblem. Choose talent Thrill, Tenacity and Quantum Charge. Thrill for an additional attack damage from items. Tenacity for a bit of tanking damage when your hp goes below 50%. Lastly Quantum Charge as a substitute lifesteal before you get your items and bit of moment speeds.

equips.equip_desc: The 2,3 and 4th items are essential in this meta do deal damage from a long range.

hero.hero_overview: Bruno is marksman who reliable and a good choice of marksman in most of the time. He have a good lifesteal and have a good amount of burst damage in early and late game.
hero.hero_strength: One of the best marksman hero who have a good amount of life steal and crit damage in early and late game. He can burst down the opponent marksman and mages easily and also including tanks depending on what you build for his items.
hero.hero_weakness: His is hard to play for the beginner player because of his skill 1 that need to maintain stacks to deal considerable crit damage in early game.

emblems.emblem_desc: Quantum Charge as an emblem is good for Bruno because it boosts his damage output and attack speed, which are essential for a marksman like him. This talent enhances his ability to deal more damage during extended fights, especially in combination with his skills. The cooldown reduction and mana regeneration also help Bruno use his abilities more frequently, giving him more control and impact during skirmishes and team fights. Overall, Quantum Charge increases Bruno's sustained damage potential,

equips.equip_desc: Haas's Claws, Berserker Fury, and Malefic Gun are excellent items for Bruno's build because they complement his high-damage, sustained attacks. Haas's Claws provides lifesteal, allowing Bruno to sustain himself in fights, while Berserker Fury boosts his critical damage, increasing his overall burst potential. Malefic Gun enhances his ability to deal damage to tanks and high-defense enemies by ignoring a portion of their armor, making him more effective against all types of targets. Together, the

hero.hero_overview:
Bruno as a Jungler in Season 34 is quite hard as the META is in the favor of assassins, but we can make it work if you play him properly. 

When the game starts, buy a Ice Retribution boots because for its extra movement speed as well as it slows the enemy when used. Go to the buff where EXP lane is, if the buff on the EXP lane is the Red Buff, clear the Stone Jungle after it. If the EXP lane is on the Blue Buff, clear the Blue and go straight to Stone Jungle and the Red Buff.
hero.hero_strength: Bruno is a high-damage marksman known for his unique football-themed abilities and his ability to deal sustained damage over time. He excels at attacking from a distance, shredding enemies with his powerful ranged attacks. With his ability to control the battlefield and deal significant damage during team fights, Bruno is a formidable presence in the late game.
hero.hero_weakness: As a jungler, Bruno's weaknesses include low mobility and a heavy reliance on positioning. Heroes like Aldous, Lancelot, Chou, and Kaja can counter him effectively. Aldous can close the gap and burst him down, while Lancelot's mobility allows him to outmaneuver Bruno. Chou can kick him into his team, and Kaja can isolate him with his ultimate, leaving Bruno unable to escape or deal damage.

data.recommend: This is how to dominate in solo queue using Bruno as a Jungler.

spell.spell_desc: **Ice Retribution** is a great choice for **Bruno** because it helps him slow down enemies, making it easier to land attacks and secure kills. Since Bruno relies on positioning and staying at range, the slowing effect helps prevent enemies from escaping or engaging him. Additionally, it enhances his crowd control and supports his team in both ganks and team fights, giving him a strategic advantage in dealing consistent damage while staying safe.

data.title: How to Make Bruno Jungle Work in S34
